 CAddEncryptionKeyRepresents adding an encryption key to the table
 CAddPartitionSpecRepresents adding a new partition spec to the table

 CAddSnapshotRepresents adding a snapshot to the table
 CAddSortOrderRepresents adding a new sort order to the table
 CAssertCurrentSchemaIDRequirement that the current schema ID matches
 CAssertDefaultSortOrderIDRequirement that the default sort order ID matches
 CAssertDefaultSpecIDRequirement that the default partition spec ID matches
 CAssertDoesNotExistRequirement that the table does not exist
 CAssertLastAssignedFieldIdRequirement that the last assigned field ID matches
 CAssertLastAssignedPartitionIdRequirement that the last assigned partition ID matches
 CAssertRefSnapshotIDRequirement that a reference (branch or tag) points to a specific snapshot
 CAssertUUIDRequirement that the table UUID matches the expected value
 CAssignUUIDRepresents an assignment of a UUID to the table
 CRemoveEncryptionKeyRepresents removing an encryption key from the table
 CRemovePartitionSpecsRepresents removing partition specs from the table
 CRemovePartitionStatisticsRepresents removing partition statistics for a snapshot

 CRemoveSchemasRepresents removing schemas from the table
 CRemoveSnapshotRefRepresents removing a snapshot reference
 CRemoveSnapshotsRepresents removing snapshots from the table
 CRemoveStatisticsRepresents removing statistics for a snapshot
